texto: The role of an activist is not to lead the masses with a flag draped around his or her shoulders. Activists meet a few people at a time in a coffee shop to explain in hushed tones why they should believe when no one else does. An activist’s moment is not the moment of change
autor: it is the period when change seems impossible.
explicacao: Orientação direta de it is the period when change seems impossible. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “The role of an activist is not to lead the masses with a flag draped around his or her shoulders.…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, ahmed-salah, reflexao, útil em momentos de mudanca e reflexao.
